title: App bundles - to increase sales

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Following many customer requests, we would like to have the ability so set app bundles’ in the monday billing.
For 2 types of bundles-
1- We have 3 apps in the market place- say a monday account wants to have all of them or 2 of them, we’d like to give some discount in a bundle price (that we will set in the developers).
2- A bundle of apps between to app partners. Say Getsign and Superform work well together, we’d like to give some discount in a bundle price (that we will set in the developers).
The impact is enormous - we could sell other partner apps together with ours when there is a suitable use case - these scenarios happen all the time

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @Michaleiba for the request!!

Everyone: You can vote at the top of this screen
